title: Enterprise Tax Management Platform Regeneration Programme Accounting Officer's Assessment Summary
body: "In January 2025, HMRC’s Accounting Officer undertook an assessment of the Enterprise Tax Management Platform Regeneration Programme.  The Enterprise Tax Management Platform is the strategic technology backbone of HMRC’s tax accounting and payment capability. It currently administers over 40 tax regimes, with all remaining tax regimes expected to migrate onto the platform.  The Accounting Officer’s assessment concluded that the programme remains value for money and deliverable.  "
